description: Address review feedback: wire gate into auth system, create migration, protect seed route, prevent self-demotion, add type comment
steps: 1. Add superAdminRole to AuthContext interface and populate it in requireAuth from DB query
2. Remove (ctx as any) cast in super-admin-gate.ts now that type is properly defined
3. Wire requireSuperAdminPerm into access-control PATCH route with users.manage permission
4. Wire requireSuperAdminPerm into plans/seed POST route with plans.manage permission
5. Create migration 0012_add_super_admin_role.sql for the super_admin_role column
6. Add self-demotion check in access-control PATCH handler
7. Add type comment in plan-definitions.ts for maxStorageGb numeric conversion
acceptance_criteria: requireAuth populates superAdminRole from DB for super admin users
super-admin-gate.ts uses ctx.superAdminRole instead of (ctx as any).superAdminRole
access-control PATCH requires users.manage permission via requireSuperAdminPerm
plans/seed POST requires plans.manage permission via requireSuperAdminPerm
Self-demotion returns 403 with descriptive error message
verification: npx vitest run passes all tests
findings: All 5 review issues addressed. TypeScript compiles cleanly. All 435 tests pass.
